name: Patient Services & Reimbursement
description: Benefit verification, prior authorization, denial appeals, and ATC scheduling for patients on the path to TIL therapy.

name: Manufacturing Operations (iCTC)
description: GMP production of autologous TIL at the Iovance Cell Therapy Center: batch execution, batch records, deviations, environmental monitoring.

name: Manufacturing Sciences (MSAT)
description: Process characterization, tech transfer from development into GMP, comparability, and manufacturing investigation support.

name: Quality Assurance
description: Batch disposition, deviations and CAPAs, change control, SOP lifecycle, and audit/inspection readiness.

name: Quality Control
description: Release and in-process testing: identity, potency, sterility, and flow cytometry, with LIMS data review and OOS investigations.

name: Supply Chain & Cold Chain Logistics
description: Bidirectional cold chain (fresh tumor inbound, cryopreserved product outbound), chain of identity/custody, materials, and demand planning.

name: Regulatory Affairs
description: Global submissions, health-authority query responses, commitment tracking, labeling, and regulatory intelligence.

name: Clinical Operations
description: Trial execution and CRO/site oversight: monitoring reports, deviations, TMF, AE narratives, and enrollment planning.

name: Commercial (Sales & Marketing)
description: Field force support for ATCs, market access, brand, MLR review, CRM, and competitive intelligence.

name: Medical Affairs & Pharmacovigilance
description: MSL field medical, medical information desk, and drug safety/PV case intake, literature surveillance, and congress readouts.

name: Finance & FP&A
description: Controllership, FP&A, and cost accounting: month-end close, reconciliation, management reporting, and COGS-per-batch.

name: Human Resources
description: Talent acquisition, onboarding, training compliance, and people operations for a fast-ramping cell-therapy workforce.

name: IT, Data & Digital
description: Enterprise systems (MES, LIMS, ERP, orchestration), service desk, data integration, and computer-system validation.

name: Legal & Compliance
description: Contract drafting and review, CDA/MSA throughput, policy lifecycle, and healthcare-compliance monitoring.

name: Procurement & Sourcing
description: Sourcing of GMP raw materials, media, consumables, and services: PO processing, supplier qualification, spend analysis, and risk.

name: Manufacturing Coordination
description: Schedules and tracks production orders through the orchestration system. (Retained from the original demo dataset.)
